## Document

Which public document needs attention?

## Issue

Describe the unclear or inconsistent architecture/protocol wording.

## Claim boundary

Does the wording affect:

- governed execution
- permit-scoped authorization
- heterogeneous verification
- receipt-backed evidence
- arbitration policy
- governed compute commitment
- transaction-bound telemetry concepts

## Proposed clarification

Suggest a public-safe clarification.

Do not request or include private runtime evidence, deployment scripts, host details, keys, paths, hashes, or operational commands.
